_meta.source: Research agent, each URL live-fetched and verified (dated events in static HTML). Excluded JS-only (KITZ, Deutsches Museum) and login-walled sources.

proposed.name: Münchner Marionettentheater — Programm
proposed.notes: ~60-70 dated shows with times + ages, clean chronological static HTML.

proposed.name: Münchner Theater für Kinder — Spielplan
proposed.notes: Children's theatre, ages 4-10, ~16+ dated shows, robots-clean, static HTML.

proposed.name: in-muenchen.de — Tipps für Kids
proposed.notes: ~70+ family events (theatre, workshops, concerts) with dates/locations, static HTML cards, some JSON-LD.

proposed.name: Kindermuseum München — Veranstaltungen
proposed.notes: Children's museum, ages 4-12, ~8 dated events, static HTML.

proposed.name: ÖBZ — Ökologisches Bildungszentrum München
proposed.notes: ~50+ dated events; Kinderwerkstatt, Familienvormittag, Ferienprogramm. Static HTML.

proposed.name: LBV München — Veranstaltungen & Exkursionen
proposed.notes: Landesbund für Vogel- und Naturschutz; ~40+ dated, Ferienprogramm (6-10), family festivals. WordPress static HTML.

proposed.name: NaturFreunde Bezirk München — Veranstaltungen
proposed.notes: Naturfreunde-equivalent; family/youth outings, iCal download link per event (generic iCal waterfall may catch it $0).
